description: Per-table DQ rule catalog consumed by @dlt.expect_* decorators in ref-ingestion pipelines.

hard_fail.category_enum: category IS NULL OR category IN ('ORDER_REQUEST','ORDER','ROUTING','MODIFICATION','EXECUTION','ALLOCATION','QUOTE','COMBINED_ORDER','REPRESENTATIVE_ORDER','MANUAL')
hard_fail.phase_enum: phase IS NULL OR phase IN ('2a','2b','2c','2d','2e')

warn_only.exactly_50_rows: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ref_cat_event_type WHERE is_active = TRUE) = 50

hard_fail.country_code_iso3166: country_code IS NULL OR country_code RLIKE '^[A-Z]{2}$'
hard_fail.status_enum: status IS NULL OR status IN ('ACTIVE','DELETED','MODIFIED','EXPIRED')

hard_fail.alpha_3_valid: alpha_3_code IS NULL OR alpha_3_code RLIKE '^[A-Z]{3}$'
hard_fail.numeric_code_3_digits: numeric_code IS NULL OR numeric_code RLIKE '^[0-9]{3}$'
hard_fail.category_enum: category IS NULL OR category IN ('AMERICAS','EMEA','APAC','AFRICA')

hard_fail.minor_unit_valid: minor_unit IS NULL OR minor_unit BETWEEN 0 AND 8
hard_fail.category_enum: category IS NULL OR category IN ('FIAT','CRYPTO','PRECIOUS_METAL','FUND','OTHER')

hard_fail.category_prefix_valid: category IS NULL OR category IN ('E','D','R','O','F','S','H','I','J','K','L','M','T')

hard_fail.country_code_iso3166: country_code IS NULL OR country_code RLIKE '^[A-Z]{2}$'

hard_fail.fix_tag_40_numeric: fix_tag_40_value IS NULL OR fix_tag_40_value RLIKE '^[A-Z0-9]{1,3}$'
hard_fail.category_enum: category IS NULL OR category IN ('SIMPLE','CONDITIONAL','PEGGED','ALGO','DISCRETIONARY')

hard_fail.fix_tag_59_numeric: fix_tag_59_value IS NULL OR fix_tag_59_value RLIKE '^[0-9]{1,2}$'

hard_fail.fix_tag_21_value_enum: fix_tag_21_value IS NULL OR fix_tag_21_value IN ('1','2','3')

hard_fail.regulatory_capacity_enum: regulatory_capacity IS NULL OR regulatory_capacity IN ('PRINCIPAL','AGENCY','RISKLESS_PRINCIPAL','FIDUCIARY')

hard_fail.asset_class_enum: asset_class IS NULL OR asset_class IN ('EQUITY','FIXED_INCOME','FX','COMMODITY','CRYPTO','RATES','CREDIT','EQUITY_DERIVATIVE')

hard_fail.category_enum: category IS NULL OR category IN ('ACTUAL','30_360','BUSINESS_252')

hard_fail.bic_valid_when_present: bic_code IS NULL OR bic_code RLIKE '^[A-Z]{6}[A-Z0-9]{2}([A-Z0-9]{3})?$'
hard_fail.category_enum: category IS NULL OR category IN ('CSD','ICSD','CCP','CASH_CSD')

hard_fail.jurisdiction_enum: jurisdiction_scope IS NULL OR jurisdiction_scope IN ('NATIONAL','FEDERAL','STATE','SUPRANATIONAL')

hard_fail.default_prob_nonneg: default_probability IS NULL OR default_probability BETWEEN 0 AND 1
hard_fail.basel_risk_weight_range: basel_risk_weight IS NULL OR basel_risk_weight BETWEEN 0 AND 1.5

hard_fail.default_withhold_range: default_withholding_rate IS NULL OR default_withholding_rate BETWEEN 0 AND 1
hard_fail.treaty_withhold_range: treaty_withholding_rate IS NULL OR treaty_withholding_rate BETWEEN 0 AND 1
hard_fail.category_enum: category IS NULL OR category IN ('FEDERAL','STATE','PROVINCIAL','MUNICIPAL','SUPRANATIONAL')
